text: I feel a disquieting calm in this dimly lit, clinical space. The harsh artificial lights and reflective surfaces evoke a sense of detachment from warmth and comfort. The silence is profound, broken only by faint hums of machinery, prompting me to become aware of my aloneness. The presence of 'R+D' hints at human creativity and progress, yet I see no one; it is as if I have arrived after hope has departed, leaving only the shell of ambition behind.
